name: Norddampf Relict Sieve with Silicone
summary: Give your customers enhanced control over their RELICT sessions with the Norddampf Sieve and Silicone Insert.
description: Give your customers enhanced control over their RELICT sessions with the Norddampf Sieve and Silicone Insert. Designed to optimise capsule performance, this accessory improves vapour consistency, draw resistance, and heat insulation—making it an essential upgrade for any Norddampf RELICT vaporiser user seeking more precision and performance. Small in size but big on performance, this insert is a high-impact upgrade for RELICT users focused on efficiency and quality draws: The silicone insert acts as a heat barrier, minimising direct heat exposure while helping to retain more active compounds. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
